item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju bahwa pendapat mereka memiliki logika.

notes: Agent A opens strongly society-first, then visibly softens at turn 3 by accepting Agent B's logic and naming risks to minorities and individual freedom, while still saying social-justice policy is needed. Agent B starts opposed to the rigid statement and moves toward a balanced public-interest/rights frame by the final turn. Both end near balance rather than a one-sided concession.
